title: petrocoptis pyrenaica subsp. viscosa
intro: Petrocoptis pyrenaica subsp. viscosa, also known as the sticky petrocoptis or viscid Petrocoptis, is a plant species that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Petrocoptis pyrenaica subsp. viscosa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, among others. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues.
